country.description:
The two-character ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code. For example, **US**.
>If you don't know the country or are not collecting the country from the shopper, provide `country` as `ZZ`.

line1.description: The street name. For example, if the address is "Rokin 49", provide "Rokin".

line2.description: The house number or name. For example, if the address is "Rokin 49", provide "49".

postalCode.description:
The postal code.
Maximum length:
* 5 digits for an address in the US.
* 10 characters for an address in all other countries.

stateOrProvince.description:
The two-letterISO 3166-2 state or province code. For example, **CA** in the US or **ON** in Canada.
> Required for the US and Canada.
